title: The Duel Turns Desperate
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on the duel turns desperate, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Duel Turns Desperate. Sanji’s fight with Bon Clay reaches its decisive point as loyalty, deception, and raw strength collide. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.
